title: Pride Furnaces
body:
- Feature #1: 10 colorful furnaces in pride colors to match (almost) every orientation and to bring some color into your builds
- Feature #2: Way too many puns

The furnaces can be used like every other furnace, supporting the same recipes that the vanilla furnace does. This includes all recipes and all changes other mods are making to furnaces.

![All available Furnaces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rJz2nAvZ/images/c961223c489bb67a0e8b0f537aa75067dc234318.png)
